metadata.title: I'm Every Woman (Remix)
metadata.album: Life Is a Dance (The Remix Project)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:02.44] I'm every woman, it's all in me
[01:08.41] Anything you want done, baby
[01:11.26] I'll do it naturally
[01:16.77] I'm every woman, it's all in me
[01:22.91] I can read your thoughts right now
[01:26.08] Every one from A to Z
[01:27.95] (Woah, woah, woah)
[01:33.12] (Woah, woah, woah)
[01:35.43] I can cast a spell
[01:38.12] Of secrets you can't tell
[01:40.58] Mix a special brew
[01:42.59] Put fire inside of you
[01:44.99] But anytime you feel
[01:46.59] Danger or fear
[01:48.33] Instantly I will appear, 'cause
[01:53.23] I'm every woman, it's all in me
[01:58.68] Anything you want done, baby
[02:02.35] I'll do it naturally
[02:03.85] (Woah, woah, woah)
[02:07.71] (Woah, woah, woah)
[02:11.70] I can sense your needs
[02:14.52] Like rain unto the seeds
[02:16.88] I can make a rhyme
[02:18.45] Of confusion in your mind
[02:21.02] And when it comes down
[02:22.82] To some good old fashioned love
[02:24.12] That's what I've got plenty of, 'cause
[02:28.79] I'm every woman, it's all in me
[02:35.27] Anything you want done, baby
[02:38.06] I'll do it naturally
[02:43.24] I'm every woman, it's all in me
[02:50.02] I can read your thoughts right now
[02:52.36] Every one from A to Z
[02:54.60] (Woah, woah, woah)
[02:57.79] (Woah, woah, woah)
[03:07.66] I ain't braggin' 'cause I'm the one
[03:11.48] You just ask me ooh and it shall be done
[03:15.65] And don't bother to compare
[03:19.99] 'Cause I've got it
[03:25.93] I've got it, I've got it, yeah, I...
[04:52.45] I'm every woman
[04:56.27] I'm every woman
[04:59.11] I'm every woman
